title: Tools for Working with R-universe <https://r-universe.dev>
text: Tools Working R-universe

title: Tools for Working with R-universe <https://r-universe.dev>
text: can install development version universe r-universe: Documentation available https://docs.ropensci.org/universe

title: Tools for Working with R-universe <https://r-universe.dev>
text: Use runiverse::add() opt-package repository (modify options('repos') list). details see documentation runiverse::add().
code: # Install a package from r-universe universe::add("ropensci") install.packages("magick")

what: Enable a package repository from r-universe — add
title: Enable a package repository from r-universe — add
text: Adds r-universe package repositories options("repos") used default install.packages(). universe already enabled, added , hence harmless call function multiple times.

title: Enable a package repository from r-universe — add
Enable a package repository from r-universe — add
text: universe vector name(s) universe(s), .e. subdomain part https://ropensci.r-universe.dev.

title: Enable a package repository from r-universe — add
text: updated list repositories

title: Enable a package repository from r-universe — add
text: Note changes options permanent. automatically enable repository every R session, can call function ~/.Rprofile script.

title: Search the R universe — ru_search
text: Free text search package titles, authors, description, topics, etc.

title: Search the R universe — ru_search
text: q string search . Wrap double quotes get exact matches. universe universe target. Default universes. ... extra parameters subject change.

title: Search the R universe — ru_search
text: dataframe description data

title: Search the R universe — ru_search
text: parameters output fields subject change.

title: Download snapshot — repo_snapshot
text: Downloads full copy (snapshot) R package repository.

title: Download snapshot — repo_snapshot
text: repo url cran-like repository snapshot bin_versions vector versions R download win/mac binary packages. default download binaries local version. Set NULL download binaries.

title: Download snapshot — repo_snapshot
code: repo_snapshot('https://jeroen.r-universe.dev', bin_versions = c("4.1", "4.2", "4.3")) #> Mirroring repo: https://jeroen.r-universe.dev/src/contrib #> Mirroring repo:
